info.name: Sovereign Kanban — Migration from Deck
info.summary: Migrate your Nextcloud Deck cards to Sovereign Kanban
info.description:
One-time migration tool to import all your Deck boards and cards into Sovereign Kanban's file-based storage.
After successful import, you can safely uninstall this app. Installation: occ app:install sovereign-kanban-import Uninstall: occ app:remove sovereign-kanban-import
info.author: Alain Lauzon
Alain
